# DriveBuddies Fahrschule

> Modern driving school based in Thalwil on Lake Zurich, serving Zürich and the
> surrounding canton. We offer car (Kat. B), motorcycle (Kat. A) and trailer
> (Kat. BE) training, plus all mandatory Swiss courses, with lessons available
> in German and English.

## Key facts

- Name: Drive Buddies Fahrschule
- Address: Albisstrasse 1, 8800 Thalwil, Switzerland
- Phone / WhatsApp: +41 76 586 13 17
- Email: info@drivebuddies.ch
- Area served: Zürich, Thalwil, Kanton Zürich
- Hours: Mon–Fri 07:00–22:00, Sat 07:00–19:00
- Languages: German, English
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/drive_buddies/

## Services & courses

- [Driving lessons – Car (Kat. B), manual or automatic](https://drivebuddies.ch/dienstleistungen/auto/)
- [Driving lessons – Motorcycle (Kat. A)](https://drivebuddies.ch/dienstleistungen/motorrad/)
- [Driving lessons – Trailer (Kat. BE)](https://drivebuddies.ch/dienstleistungen/anhaenger/)
- [Nothelferkurs (first-aid course)](https://drivebuddies.ch/nothelferkurs/)
- [VKU (Verkehrskundeunterricht / traffic-theory course)](https://drivebuddies.ch/vku/)
- [Theorieprüfung (theory exam) preparation](https://drivebuddies.ch/theoriepruefung/)
- [Kontrollfahrt (control drive)](https://drivebuddies.ch/kontrollfahrt/)
- [2-Phasen-Ausbildung / WAB](https://drivebuddies.ch/2-phasen-ausbildung/)

## How to get a Swiss driving licence

- [The path to your Führerschein (overview / HowTo)](https://drivebuddies.ch/fuehrerschein/)
- [Lernfahrausweis (learner's permit)](https://drivebuddies.ch/lernfahrausweis/)
- [Führerausweis (full licence)](https://drivebuddies.ch/fuehrerausweis/)

- [Home](https://drivebuddies.ch/)
- [Courses overview](https://drivebuddies.ch/kurse/)
- [Services overview](https://drivebuddies.ch/dienstleistungen/)
- [Prices](https://drivebuddies.ch/preise/)
- [About us](https://drivebuddies.ch/ueber-uns/)
- [Contact](https://drivebuddies.ch/kontakt/)
- [Blog](https://drivebuddies.ch/blog/)

## English

An English version of every page is available under the `/en/` prefix, e.g.
[English home](https://drivebuddies.ch/en/), [Courses](https://drivebuddies.ch/en/courses/),
[Prices](https://drivebuddies.ch/en/prices/), [Contact](https://drivebuddies.ch/en/contact/).
